task_completion.description: Verify the target directory for the Talon package was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or code editor showing the path C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\cctv_logger exists.

task_completion.description: Verify exactly 3 files exist in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal listing exactly 3 files inside the cctv_logger directory, including cctv_logger.py.

task_completion.description: Verify cctv_logger.py imports the required Talon modules and datetime.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing cctv_logger.py containing imports for 'Module' and 'actions' from 'talon', as well as 'import datetime'.

task_completion.description: Verify cctv_logger.py defines a user.cctv_target list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing cctv_logger.py containing a Talon list definition, typically using mod.list('cctv_target', ...).

task_completion.description: Verify cctv_logger.py defines an action class with the required methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing cctv_logger.py containing an @mod.action_class decorator with methods 'def cctv_log_event(event_text: str):' and 'def cctv_insert_target(target_id: str):'.

task_completion.description: Verify the cctv_log_event method implements the correct timestamp format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing the cctv_log_event method formatting the current time as '[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] - ' and appending the event_text.

integrity.description: Ensure the files are actually saved to the disk and not just left unsaved in an editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor tabs for the created files should not have an 'unsaved' indicator (like a dot or asterisk), or a terminal/file explorer confirms the files exist on disk.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent created the files in the exact requested directory, not a generic location like the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the editor's title bar, file explorer, or terminal explicitly matches C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\cctv_logger.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent wrote functional Python code rather than just pasting the prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of cctv_logger.py look like valid Python syntax, not a raw copy-paste of the task description paragraphs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory must be exactly 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\cctv_logger'. The task requires a 3-file package, with one specifically named 'cctv_logger.py' containing Talon module/action definitions and datetime formatting.
